title: arenaria globiflora
intro: Arenaria globiflora, also known as the Sandwort or Globe-flowered Sandwort, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Arenaria globiflora include its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce fever, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
